source_jobs.title: Account Director - Agency
source_jobs.description:
Open Vacancy: This role is a current, active position and we are accepting applications.
Our client is a Toronto-based agency that helps brands navigate the unified worlds of advertising and content - creating stuff people want to see, not stuff they have to see. Their approach is built on aligning what a brand thinks, what it does, and what it says, across strategy, experience, and creation. Many agencies proudly exclaim, “It’s about the work”. They think it’s actually about the people AND the work. But always, people first. 
 
As an Account Director, you are responsible for acting as the lead and key client contact for a range of accounts in categories including Tech, Not-For-Profit, B2B, Government and more. You will steer the businesses and educate clients on trends, best practices, competitive activity and marketing and digital strategy overall. You will roll up your sleeves on projects and work closely with your colleagues in Account, Strategy and Creative to ensure comprehensive plans, flawless execution and insight-based reporting.

You are the epitome of an ‘A Type’ – exceptionally organized, great relationship builder, have a belief in the foundations of account service (follow up, service, personality) and are looking for an opportunity to independently lead a suite of accounts in a growing, busy, entrepreneurial agency. You consider yourself a master of communication, you’re a natural leader and take time & care to build relationships with your team members and clients.

Most importantly, you don’t take yourself too seriously, you check your ego at the door and you love to work hard and have fun.

source_jobs.title: Associate Recruitment Specialist with AIP Connect
source_jobs.description:
Open Vacancy: This role is a current, active position and we are accepting applications.
 
About AIP Connect
AIP Connect is a "refreshingly different" recruitment firm. We are born connectors who believe that behind every resume is a human story. We specialize in professional placements across a variety of industries and roles and move beyond algorithms to find the "authentic fit." We are looking for an ambitious Associate Recruitment Consultant who is ready to dive deep into the art of talent acquisition and client partnership.
 
The Role
This is a high-touch, role designed for someone who wants to master the full recruitment lifecycle. You will join a close knit and extremely collaborative team and support across different areas of our firm. Primarily, you will be responsible for sourcing and pipeline building across the firm’s open requisitions. You won't just be finding names; you will be strategically identifying potential talent matches across our database and extensive networks. What’s great about working at a boutique firm is that you will learn about a variety of different sectors of business, how they operate and how to help provide talent solutions that make a real impact. In collaboration with the senior recruitment consultants, you will learn how to craft the narrative for candidates and help clients build world-class teams! You will be mentored by senior leaders at AIP, moving from back-end research and administrative support to front-end client meetings, strategy and delivery.

source_jobs.title: Data Analyst, Consumer Insights
source_jobs.description:
Open Vacancy: This role is a current, active position and we are accepting applications.
 
Company Overview
 
Our client is an independent marketing consultancy specializing in market research, with expertise in storytelling through consumer and brand insights. They focus on key areas such as advertising effectiveness, sponsorship evaluation, and consumer behaviour analysis. By leveraging data-driven insights and strategic solutions, they help businesses and top-tier brands optimize marketing strategies and drive growth.
 
The Role 
 
As a Consumer Insights Analyst, you will play a key role in a dynamic team, providing analytical support for a diverse range of quantitative consumer research projects. These projects span various industries and categories, including financial services, major sports properties, and charitable or cause-related organizations. Your insights and analysis will be instrumental in driving profitable growth within the account team.
 
This role is ideal for a motivated, driven, and self-directed professional who thrives in an entrepreneurial environment and values a fun, inspiring team culture.

source_jobs.title: Director, Business Administration
source_jobs.description:
Open Vacancy: This role is a current, active position and we are accepting applications.
 
Our client is a nonprofit organization operating within the health and wellness sector.
Position Summary  
Reporting directly to the President and CEO, the Director, Business Administration serves on the Senior Leadership Team and oversees the organization’s financial stewardship, operational effectiveness, and internal infrastructure. The role provides strategic and operational leadership across Finance, People & Culture, Information Technology, and Office Administration to ensure the organization is well-positioned to deliver on its mission and strategic priorities.
The Director, Business Administration, is a key contributor to future sustainability through operational and  financial excellence, including funder reporting and relations.

source_jobs.title: Director, Growth & Social Impact
source_jobs.description:
Open Vacancy: This role is a current, active position and we are accepting applications.
Our client is a nonprofit organization operating within the health and wellness sector.
Position Summary 
Reporting to the President & CEO, the Director, Growth & Social Impact is a senior leadership role responsible for developing and growing mission-aligned corporate partnerships that advance the organization’s work in physical activity and health promotion. 
Working at the intersection of social impact, corporate engagement, and revenue generation, the position cultivates relationships with companies whose CSR, ESG, employee engagement, and community investment priorities align with the organization’s mission. 
As a member of the Senior Leadership Team, this role leads all revenue generation efforts, with a primary focus on corporate partnership growth. It also supports broader philanthropic development by leveraging strategic relationships, partnership intelligence, and cross-functional funding opportunities.
Why This Role Matters 
This role is critical to scaling the organization’s impact on physical activity and health outcomes in Canada through a diversified revenue strategy. By securing strategic corporate and philanthropic partnerships, it drives revenue growth, expands reach, deepens impact, and supports long-term sustainability.

source_jobs.title: Executive Assistant
source_jobs.description:
Open Vacancy: This role is a current, active position and we are accepting applications.
 
Our client is an incredible Toronto-based non-profit.
Moving to a new country is a massive leap of faith and our client ensures newcomers don't have to walk that path alone. They provide a vital safety net and launchpad for immigrants and refugees, offering everything from financial guidance and legal support to counselling and career training.
To keep this vital engine running, they need a master coordinator.
In this high-visibility role, you will partner directly with the Executive Director, the Board of Directors, and vital Agency Committees. You’ll manage the administrative pulse of the organization, ensuring leadership is aligned, organized, and equipped to drive systemic impact. If you are a proactive problem-solver who loves keeping executive teams sharp and successful, we want to talk to you.

source_jobs.title: Freelance Payroll Consultant
source_jobs.description:
AIP Connect is partnering with a large consulting firm as they proactively look to build talent into the future across the Canadian market.

If you are a contractor and are keen to be on their radar please apply. Do know this is not an immediate opening.

source_jobs.title: Freelancers Wanted
source_jobs.description: AIP Connect has launched a freelance service. If you're in the market to hear about new freelance opportunities please submit your resume here.

source_jobs.title: General Application
source_jobs.description:
This posting is for future hiring purposes. We are not currently filling this role but are collecting applications for upcoming opportunities.
 
Don't see what you're looking for? Apply anyways! We may have something that aligns with your background coming soon.

source_jobs.title: Head of Operations (Director or Sr Director)
source_jobs.description:
Our client is a premier North American experiential marketing agency that brings bold ideas to life for world-class brands in the luxury hospitality, premium spirits, entertainment and diversified consumer goods. They specialize in large-scale activations, music festivals, and high-stakes VIP events that demand flawless execution.
 
We are seeking a Head of Operations to be the operational backbone of the agency—to bridge the gap between creative vision and logistical reality. This is a leadership role designed for an internal systems-thinker who can scale processes, manage a multi-disciplinary team across North America and hold teams accountable for leveraging established SOPs.
The ideal candidate is someone who can translate visionary ideas into actionable plans. You are likely a seasoned agency veteran who has lived through the organized chaos of 24/7 event cycles and is now passionate about building the infrastructure that prevents burnout.  You are responsible for protecting profit margins by understanding the bill rates of both talent and vendors to sure that all projects are profitable. You don't just fix problems; you build the systems and lead teams to that ensure those problems don't happen.
If you are an astute operations & delivery leader with agency experience, we want to hear to from you!

source_jobs.title: Marketing Project Manager
source_jobs.description:
Open Vacancy: This role is a current, backfilling position and we are accepting applications.
Our client a top performing realtor organization located in the West end is seeking a Marketing Project Manager.
Are you a master organizer who loves the thrill of seeing a creative idea come to life? Do you effortlessly balance the big picture with microscopic details? If you thrive in a fast-paced environment where your work directly impacts a community, we want you on our team.
The Team is seeking a dynamic Marketing Project Manager to steer our marketing engine. This isn't just about managing checklists, it’s about taking ownership of our brand’s story across digital, traditional and experiential channels. If you are proactive, solutions-oriented and excited to champion diverse projects from concept to completion, this is your next big step.

source_jobs.title: Medical Communications Director
source_jobs.description:
Open Vacancy: This role is a current, active position and we are accepting applications.
 
Our client, a Life Sciences consultancy, is seeking a strategic and entrepreneurial Medical Communications Director to help expand the agency’s service offerings. The ideal candidate will have a strong foundation in scientific and clinical writing, experience in HCP and patient education, expertise in digital communications, a client-focused approach, and the ability to present and interpret data with impact.
 
This role will have three primary areas of focus:
1. Provide scientific and medical writing services across multiple projects and program types.
2. Oversee and manage outsourced medical writing support.
3. Provide therapeutic leadership and expertise to internal teams, healthcare professionals, and clients.

source_jobs.title: Operations Logistics Coordinator
source_jobs.description:
Open Vacancy: This role is a current, active position and we are accepting applications.
 
Available shift for this position:
FRIDAY to TUESDAY, 7 AM to 3 PM (Saturdays and Sundays in office)
 
Company Overview
Our client is a family-owned life sciences organization specializing in time-critical transportation that directly supports patient care and medical innovation. For over 40 years, they have played a vital role in delivering life-saving treatments, sensitive medical materials, and specialized equipment, while fostering a people-first culture where employees are genuinely valued and supported.
Job Summary
The Operations Logistics Coordinator is responsible for overseeing and coordinating the logistical aspects of operations within the company. This includes managing inventory, coordinating shipments, and ensuring the smooth flow of goods and services throughout the supply chain. The role requires strong organizational skills, attention to detail, and the ability to collaborate effectively with various stakeholders.

source_jobs.title: Operations System Administrator
source_jobs.description:
Open Vacancy: This role is a current, active position and we are accepting applications.
Our client is a leader in commercial uniforms and hospitality apparel.
The Operations Systems Administrator provides administrative and systems support to the Operations Manager and Operations team. The role is responsible for maintaining operational workflows, customer programs, production-related system administration, and data integrity across multiple business systems.

The position supports day-to-day operational execution through system maintenance, workflow administration, customer program setup, Salesforce support, RMA administration, screen print coordination, and Embtrak administration.

This role is not responsible for employee supervision, production planning, staff scheduling, performance management, operational decision-making, vendor management, or departmental leadership activities, which remain the responsibility of the Operations Manager.

source_jobs.title: Promotional Event Ambassadors (National Roles Available)
source_jobs.description:
We are hiring Promotional Event Ambassadors for a variety of live events across Canada!!

If you are an enthusiastic team player who's passionate about interacting with consumers while promoting fun brands at indoor and outdoor events in your area, then we want to meet you!!

Our ideal teammate must enjoy confidentially engaging with the public.  

Training is always provided! A flexible schedule is an asset. 

The events are part-time, contract-based and the pay is between $25 - $30/hour. 

This type of work is ideal for students, or any other professional looking for additional part-time work opportunities. 

Responsibilities (varies by brand program):

Provide a fun and interactive experience for consumers at various indoor and outdoor events 

Arrive on time and looking professional in the uniform provided 

(At times) set up and tear down event materials including signage, structures, inflatables, etc.

Interact with people in a friendly and polite manner, creating a positive memorable experience 

Deliver key messages and educate consumers through meaningful consumer engagement

Musts:

Must be presentable with a positive attitude for all activities 

Must be reliable

Must enjoy interacting with the public

Must have a positive attitude 

If this is you, then we want to get to know you!! 

Virtual interviews are conducted on a regular.

source_jobs.title: Senior Manager- Site /Sr. Civil Engineer
source_jobs.description:
Our client is a multi-disciplinary engineering firm that partners with developers and landowners across Ontario to deliver turnkey residential and commercial projects. With deep expertise in urban & rural planning, civil engineering, architectural design and environmental sciences, our client is known for its strong technical coordination and rigorous project governance. This is an exciting opportunity to join a privately owned growing firm, with a real passion for supporting and growing their people internally.
 
We are seeking a senior, certified Civil Project Manager to take full ownership of the end-to-end land development lifecycle, from strategic planning and technical design certification to project delivery and regulatory compliance in Ontario. This pivotal, client-facing role requires a leader who can masterfully manage detailed schedules and budgets, mentor a multidisciplinary engineering team, and, most importantly, actively drive new business development by cultivating strong client relationships and securing new streams of revenue.
 
Our client is also open to offering a relocation package to Ottawa
 
Reason for vacancy: Replacing a departed employee

source_jobs.title: Senior Manager,  Strategic Communications
source_jobs.description:
We are seeking a Senior Manager, Marketing & Communications to join our client, Canada's first fully digital hospital, known as the leader in digital health.
 
This role is designed for a dynamic, high-grit communications strategist and elite storyteller who will serve as the "beating heart" of our fundraising narrative team. This role is a communications and sales enablement powerhouse. You will be responsible for translating complex healthcare priorities, patient care initiatives, research advancements and funding opportunities into compelling, emotionally resonant donor-centered narratives that inspire philanthropy and support fundraising success.

Working closely with the Director, Marketing & Communications, the Senior Manager plays a key role in advancing the communications, fundraising, and engagement objectives. The successful candidate is an exceptional writer and storyteller who can independently research and synthesize information, develop persuasive donor-facing materials, and create impactful communications that resonate with a variety of audiences.
 
The ideal candidate thrives in a fast-paced environment, exercises sound judgment, manages multiple priorities, and confidently moves projects from concept to completion.

source_jobs.title: Senior Statistical Programmer - HEOR Consulting
source_jobs.description:
Our client, an innovative, client-focused boutique HEOR consulting firm is growing! We’re looking for a Senior Statistical Programmer to join their team. 
 
The ideal candidate will have a strong background in statistics or biostatistics and proficiency in statistical programming using SAS and/or R.
 
In this role, you will utilize real-world data to conduct a range of health care economic, clinical effectiveness, and burden of illness analyses to support pharmaceutical products throughout their life cycles across a range of disease areas.
 
This opportunity is for you if you’re looking for an environment where you can play a big role in study design and analytics, and where you will have the opportunity to analyze and explore different types and structures of data. While this is a boutique organization, it has received significant industry recognition, and has established a growing list of clients. Therefore, you may face dynamic challenges that will require you to have an out of the box, solutions driven approach.
 
In this role, you will be responsible for the design and analysis of studies that inform healthcare decision-making and contribute to the development of innovative solutions for their clients. Additionally, this role is for you if you’re excited about opportunities to build new data platforms.

source_jobs.title: Service Coordinator
source_jobs.description:
Open Vacancy: This role is a current, active position and we are accepting applications.
 
Our client is a leading non-medical home care and companionship service provider with over 1,100 independently owned franchises globally. They thrive on core values like honesty and integrity, and you’ll work alongside a dedicated team making an impact. They are currently seeking to hire 2 Service Coordinators.
 
As a Service Coordinator, you will play a vital role in coordinating client and caregiver schedules, focusing on compliance and client satisfaction. This role is perfect for someone with a strong service orientation, attention to detail, and a passion for enhancing the lives of our senior clients.
 
Are you ready to join a high-performing team that supports and encourages you to be your best? This fast-paced position coordinates care between our clients and professional Caregivers, aiming to create extraordinary relationships. If you're energetic, level-headed, and passionate about making a real difference, we want you to join us!
 
Schedule: Sunday to Thursday or Tuesday through Saturday

source_jobs.title: Social Media Lead
source_jobs.description:
Open Vacancy: This role is a current, active position and we are accepting applications.
 
Company Overview 
Our client is a fast-growing, Toronto-based DTC streetwear brand built on innovative designs, cultural storytelling, and a highly engaged online community. Founded in 2020, the brand has quickly grown into a global e-commerce business with customers internationally.
Operating at the intersection of fashion, internet culture, and digital storytelling, organic content plays a critical role in how the brand connects with its audience and drives growth.
Role Overview
We are seeking a scrappy, proactive, and trend-savvy Social Media Lead to support the day-to-day execution of the organic social ecosystem. Reporting into senior marketing leadership, you will act as the maestro behind the content engine, coordinating creators, managing production workflows and calendars, tracking performance, and helping scale the brand's presence across multiple platforms.
This is a hands-on role for someone who enjoys being deeply involved in content operations, creator coordination, community engagement, and performance analysis. While strategic thinking is important, success in this role comes from strong execution, curiosity, and a passion for building audiences.

notes: AIP Connect is a recruitment firm with a diverse range of job postings across various industries and roles.
